The '''''Liquidator''''' was a [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Winstel Greelanx]].

It participated in the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]], where it was destroyed by [[Mako Spince]] flying the ''[[Dragon Pearl]]'', causing its broken hulk to plummet into [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa's]] host planet and homeworld of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].

Some of the ship's plating was later salvaged, and purchased by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to reinforce the plating on the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{Mo}}
